question: The chart shows the time allocation on a typical day across different activities. Based on this data, which of the following conclusions can be made?

options.A: The time spent on Leisure is greater than the time spent on Work.
options.B: The combined time spent on Work and Chores is equal to the time spent on Sleep.
options.C: The combined share of Work, Chores, and Leisure is greater than the share of Sleep.
options.D: The time spent sleeping is greater than the combined time spent on Work, Chores, and Leisure.

explanation: This pie chart uses dual encoding: slice angle represents percentage, and the radius also varies with percentage, so slice area differences are exaggerated. That can make the largest category look overly dominant. Sleep: 40%; Work: 30%; Chores: 20%; Leisure: 10%.
